Author: JerVenture
Name: Maintenance Notification
Punchline: A plugin that will populate a window whenever maintenance is scheduled, advising you that there is maintenance
Description: This plugin will detect whenever FFXIV has maintenance scheduled, and it will cause a large window with large text advising the user of the maintenance and the day and time.

Author: JerVenture
Name: StableChocobo
Punchline: Basic plugin to detect if chocobo is summoned while trying to stable it.
Description: This plugin will populate a window as soon as you open a stable if your chocobo is currently summoned. It asks if you want to unsummon it. Upon clicking yes, it closes the chocobo stable and withdraws your chocobo.

Author: JerVenture
Name: Job Swap
Punchline: Automatically swap jobs based on conditions set.
Description: Job swap addon meant to be used with Autoduty. Allows you to select classes that you want leveled and set the desired level. After that, you just set autoduty to Auto leveling mode and start job swap. It will automatically level the jobs you designate to the level you set. There's even an option to have it start autoretainer multi mode after it finishes so you're not just idle, but also sending out retainers on all of your characters. /jobswap to open.
